name: create_diagram
description: Validate and format a Mermaid diagram. The calling agent generates the Mermaid source; this skill validates the syntax, strips code fences, attempts light repairs, and returns a corrected diagram with an element summary. Supported diagram_type values: state, sequence, er, class, data_flow, use_case. Use process_model for BPMN 2.0 XML.

diagram_source.description: Raw Mermaid source generated by the agent. May include code fences (```mermaid ... ```) — they will be stripped automatically.

title.description: Optional diagram title for the report header.

mermaid_source.description: Corrected Mermaid source with code fences stripped.

element_summary.description: Counts of nodes, edges, states, etc. depending on diagram_type.
